src: Perturbed-Attention Guidance (PAG), Smoothed Energy Guidance (SEG), Sliding Window Guidance (SWG), PLADIS, Normalized Attention Guidance (NAG), Token Perturbation Guidance (TPG), Frequency-Decoupled Guidance (FDG), Momentum Guidance (MG), Sliding Mode Control CFG (SMC-CFG), mostly for ComfyUI.
ja: Perturbed-Attention Guidance（PAG）、Smoothed Energy Guidance（SEG）、Sliding Window Guidance（SWG）、PLADIS、Normalized Attention Guidance（NAG）、Token Perturbation Guidance（TPG）、Frequency-Decoupled Guidance（FDG）、Momentum Guidance（MG）、Sliding Mode Control CFG（SMC-CFG）など、主にComfyUI向けの実装
